description.task: Implement a GraphInfo class that, given an adjacency list representation, computes: number of vertices, number of edges, whether a vertex exists, the degree of a vertex, and whether the graph has any self-loops.
instructions: edgeCount: sum all adjList values' sizes; if undirected (directed==false), divide by 2
degree(vertex): return adjList.getOrDefault(vertex, Collections.emptyList()).size(); return -1 if vertex not in map
hasSelfLoop: for each entry, check if its neighbors list contains the key itself
Graph: 4 vertices, 4 edges (undirected), degree(0)=2, degree(3)=2, no self-loops
For degree, return -1 if vertex not present
description.hint: edgeCount: int total=adjList.values().stream().mapToInt(List::size).sum(); return directed?total:total/2; degree: List<Integer> nb=adjList.get(vertex); return nb==null?-1:nb.size();
description.expectedOutput:
Vertices: 4
Edges: 4
Degree of 0: 2
Degree of 3: 2
Self-loop: false

description.task: Implement a GraphBuilder class that builds both directed and undirected graphs from a list of edges. For undirected, add both directions. Implement addEdge, removeEdge, and hasEdge methods.
instructions: For undirected graph with edges (1,2),(2,3),(1,3): each vertex has both endpoints in its neighbor set
After addEdge(1,2) in undirected: hasEdge(2,1)=true; after removeEdge(1,2): hasEdge(1,2)=false
description.hint: addEdge else: adj.get(v).add(u). removeEdge: adj.get(u).remove(v); if(!directed) adj.get(v).remove(u). hasEdge: return adj.containsKey(u)&&adj.get(u).contains(v);
description.expectedOutput:
Undirected:
1 -> [2, 3]
2 -> [1, 3]
3 -> [1, 2]
hasEdge(2,1): true
After remove(1,2): hasEdge(1,2)=false

description.task: Implement a ConnectedComponents class that finds the number of connected components in an undirected graph using DFS. Also return a mapping from each vertex to its component number.
instructions: componentMap: same DFS loop as countComponents; instead of just counting, call a DFS that labels all reachable vertices with the current component number
Use a Map<Integer,Integer> componentId; inside dfs label each visited vertex: componentId.put(v, compNum)
countComponents is already implemented — model componentMap after it
description.hint: componentMap: Map<Integer,Integer> id=new HashMap<>(); int comp=0; for(int v:graph.keySet()){if(!id.containsKey(v)){dfsLabel(graph,v,comp,id); comp++;}} return id; dfsLabel labels vertex with comp number.
